journalMoodLoggedSnack.en: Mood logged. Tap the card to add words.
journalMoodLoggedSnack.desc: Snackbar shown after the user logs a quick mood with no body text yet.

journalReauthViewEntry.desc: Reason shown in the biometric/PIN re-auth prompt when opening a locked journal entry.

journalFilterEmptyTitle.desc: Title of the empty state when no journal entries match the active filter/search.

journalFilterEmptySubtitle.en: Try a different filter or clear the search.
journalFilterEmptySubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the journal filter empty state.

journalNewEntryTitle.desc: Header of the bottom sheet that lets the user choose what kind of journal entry to write.

journalNewEntrySubtitle.en: Pick how you want to write today.
journalNewEntrySubtitle.desc: Subtitle under the New entry chooser header.

journalPlainEntryTitle.desc: Title of the option that opens a blank journal entry.

journalPlainEntrySubtitle.en: A blank page for your thoughts. Mood, tags, optional prompt.
journalPlainEntrySubtitle.desc: Description of the plain journal entry option.

journalDailyReflectionTitle.desc: Title of the option that opens the guided daily-reflection template.

journalDailyReflectionSubtitle.en: A guided page: gratitude, anchors, wins, cravings, intention.
journalDailyReflectionSubtitle.desc: Description of the guided daily reflection option.

journalBadgeNew.desc: Small 'New' badge on the daily reflection option.

journalCrisisTitleCrisis.en: I see you. Want a hand?
journalCrisisTitleCrisis.desc: Heading of the support sheet shown after a fresh entry with a 'crisis' mood.

journalCrisisTitleHard.desc: Heading of the support sheet shown after a fresh entry with a 'hard' mood.

journalCrisisBodyCrisis.en: Saving your entry helped. A short calm exercise can take it from here.
journalCrisisBodyCrisis.desc: Body of the support sheet for a crisis-mood entry.

journalCrisisBodyHard.en: You wrote it down — that already counts. A 60-second thought record can help if you want it.
journalCrisisBodyHard.desc: Body of the support sheet for a hard-mood entry.

journalCrisisCalmRoomLabel.desc: Action label routing the user to the calm/emergency toolkit.

journalCrisisCalmRoomDetail.en: Breath work, grounding, and one safe action.
journalCrisisCalmRoomDetail.desc: Detail line under the 'Open the calm room' action.

journalCrisisThoughtRecordLabel.desc: Action label routing the user to the CBT thought-record tool.

journalCrisisThoughtRecordDetail.en: Name the thought, weigh the evidence, reframe it.
journalCrisisThoughtRecordDetail.desc: Detail line under the 'Try a thought record' action.

journalCrisisDismiss.desc: Dismiss button on the post-entry crisis support sheet.

journalBucketThisWeek.desc: Section header grouping journal entries from the last 7 days.

journalBucketLastWeek.desc: Section header grouping journal entries from 8-14 days ago.

journalBucketEarlierThisMonth.desc: Section header grouping older journal entries within the current month.

journalWritingStreak.en: {count, plural, =1{1 day writing} other{{count} day writing streak}}
journalWritingStreak.desc: Journal writing streak label shown in the diary header.

journalQuickMoodPrompt.desc: Prompt on the one-tap quick-mood pill.

journalOnThisDay.en: {count, plural, =1{On this day, 1 year ago} other{On this day, {count} years ago}}
journalOnThisDay.desc: Label on the 'on this day' memory card showing how many years ago an entry was written.

journalEchoLockedEntry.desc: Placeholder text for a locked entry shown in the 'on this day' card.

journalEchoMoodCheckIn.desc: Placeholder text for a body-less mood entry shown in the 'on this day' card.

journalEchoMore.en: {count, plural, =1{+1 more from this day} other{+{count} more from this day}}
journalEchoMore.desc: Counter showing how many more entries exist from the same day in the 'on this day' card.

journalFilterAll.desc: Filter chip showing all journal entries (also reused on the vision board).

journalFilterToday.desc: Filter chip showing only today's journal entries.

journalFilterHard.desc: Filter chip showing hard/crisis-mood journal entries.

journalFilterWins.desc: Filter chip showing good/great-mood journal entries.

journalFilterLocked.desc: Filter chip showing locked journal entries.

journalSearchHint.desc: Hint text in the journal search field.

journalEmptyTitle.en: A place for the unfiltered you
journalEmptyTitle.desc: Title of the journal empty state (no entries yet).

journalEmptySubtitle.en: Pick a door — or tap + to start with a blank page.
journalEmptySubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the journal empty state.

journalBlankPageButton.desc: Button to open a blank journal entry from the empty state.

journalDeleteEntryTitle.desc: Title of the confirmation dialog when swiping to delete a journal entry.

journalDeleteEntryBody.desc: Body of the delete-entry confirmation dialog.

journalCardLockedHint.desc: Hint shown in place of the body on a locked journal card.

journalCardMoodCheckInHint.en: Mood check-in · tap to add words
journalCardMoodCheckInHint.desc: Hint shown on a body-less mood-only journal card.

journalCardDateToday.desc: Date label on a journal card written today, including the time of day.

journalEditEntryTitle.desc: Header of the journal entry sheet when editing an existing entry.

journalTodaysEntryTitle.desc: Header of the journal entry sheet when creating a new entry.

journalMoodQuestion.desc: Label above the primary mood picker in the entry sheet.

journalSubMoodSpecific.desc: Label above the sub-mood picker when the primary mood is 'great'.

journalSubMoodUnderneath.desc: Label above the sub-mood picker for non-great moods.

journalMindQuestion.desc: Label above the journal body text field.

journalVoiceStop.desc: Button label to stop voice dictation in the entry sheet.

journalVoiceSpeak.desc: Button label to start voice dictation in the entry sheet.

journalVoiceUnavailable.en: Voice input is unavailable. Check microphone permission in Settings.
journalVoiceUnavailable.desc: Snackbar shown when voice input cannot be initialised.

journalBodyHint.en: Write freely — no one else will see this...
journalBodyHint.desc: Hint text in the journal body text field.

journalTagsLabel.desc: Label above the tag picker in the entry sheet.

journalAddTagHint.desc: Hint text in the new-tag input field.

journalAdd.desc: Button to add a new tag or affirmation.

journalLockedEntryLabel.desc: Lock-toggle title when the entry is locked.

journalLockEntryLabel.desc: Lock-toggle title when the entry is unlocked.

journalLockEntryHint.en: Hidden from the list. Re-auth required to view.

journalSaveChanges.desc: Save button when editing an existing journal entry or vision item.

journalSaveEntry.desc: Save button when creating a new journal entry.

journalSuggestedPrompt.desc: Headline of the collapsed prompt strip showing a suggested journaling prompt.

journalSuggestedTag.desc: Small tag marking the smart-default journaling prompt category.

journalDraftFrom.desc: Title of the draft-restore banner; {age} is a relative time like '5m ago'.

journalDraftChars.desc: Subtitle of the draft-restore banner showing the draft mood and character count.

journalDraftDiscard.desc: Button to discard an unsaved journal draft.

journalAgeMomentAgo.desc: Relative time for a draft saved less than a minute ago.

journalAgeMinutesAgo.desc: Relative time for a draft saved N minutes ago.

journalAgeHoursAgo.desc: Relative time for a draft saved N hours ago.

journalAgeYesterday.desc: Relative time for a draft saved more than a day ago.

journalPersonalCard0.en: {name}, you are doing harder things than most people will ever try.
journalPersonalCard0.desc: Personalised affirmation card addressing the user by name.

journalPersonalCard1.en: {name}, your sober self is the realest version of you.
journalPersonalCard1.desc: Personalised affirmation card addressing the user by name.

journalPersonalCard2.en: {name}, this moment is enough. You are enough.
journalPersonalCard2.desc: Personalised affirmation card addressing the user by name.

journalPersonalCard3.en: {name}, the version of you a year from now is rooting for today's you.
journalPersonalCard3.desc: Personalised affirmation card addressing the user by name.

journalPersonalGratitudeCard.en: You wrote this: "{gratitude}" — that's still true.
journalPersonalGratitudeCard.desc: Affirmation card mirroring back a recent gratitude the user wrote.

journalSwipeHint.desc: Hint under the swipeable affirmation card.

journalYourAffirmations.desc: Section header for the user's custom affirmations list.

journalTapToAddAffirmation.desc: Empty-state hint when the user has no custom affirmations.

journalAddAffirmationTitle.desc: Header of the add-affirmation bottom sheet.

journalAffirmationHint.desc: Hint text in the add-affirmation input field.

visionFilterEmptyTitle.desc: Title of the vision-board empty state when no items match the active filter.

visionFilterEmptySubtitle.en: Try a different filter, or add a new dream.
visionFilterEmptySubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the vision-board filter empty state.

visionBoardTitle.desc: Title of the vision board header banner.

visionBoardEmptyTagline.en: Visualise the life ahead of you
visionBoardEmptyTagline.desc: Tagline shown in the vision board header when there are no items.

visionDreamCount.desc: Count of dreams on the vision board, shown in the header subtitle.

visionPinnedCount.desc: Count of pinned dreams in the vision board header subtitle.

visionAchievedCount.desc: Count of achieved dreams in the vision board header subtitle.

visionFilterActive.desc: Vision board filter chip for active (not-yet-achieved) dreams.

visionFilterPinned.desc: Vision board filter chip for pinned dreams.

visionFilterAchieved.desc: Vision board filter chip for achieved dreams.

visionEmptyTitle.en: What does your life ahead look like?
visionEmptyTitle.desc: Title of the vision board empty state (no items yet).

visionEmptySubtitle.en: Start with one of these — or tap + for a blank canvas.
visionEmptySubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the vision board empty state.

visionBlankDreamButton.desc: Button to add a blank vision item from the empty state.

visionTapToOpen.desc: Hint on a vision card without milestones, prompting the user to open it.

visionRemoveDreamTitle.desc: Title of the confirm dialog when long-pressing to delete a vision item.

visionKeep.desc: Button to cancel removing a vision item.

visionRemove.desc: Button to confirm removing a vision item.

visionEditDreamTitle.desc: Header of the vision edit sheet when editing an existing item.

visionAddDreamTitle.desc: Header of the vision edit sheet when adding a new item.

visionAddToBoard.desc: Primary button to save a new vision item.

visionRemoveThisDream.desc: Secondary button to delete a vision item from the edit sheet.

visionDreamTitleLabel.desc: Field label for the vision item title.

visionDreamTitleHint.en: e.g. Be more present for my family
visionDreamTitleHint.desc: Hint text for the vision item title field.

visionNotesLabel.desc: Field label for the optional vision item notes.

visionNotesHint.desc: Hint text for the vision item notes field.

visionWhyLabel.desc: Field label for the optional 'why it matters' field.

visionWhyHint.en: When this matters most, why does it matter?
visionWhyHint.desc: Hint text for the 'why it matters' field.

visionCategoryLabel.desc: Field label for the vision item category picker.

visionChooseIcon.desc: Field label for the vision item icon picker.

visionTargetDateLabel.desc: Field label for the optional vision item target date.

visionTargetDatePlaceholder.en: Pick a date to work toward
visionTargetDatePlaceholder.desc: Placeholder shown when no target date is set.

visionPhotosLabel.en: Photos help you feel it (up to 4)
visionPhotosLabel.desc: Field label for the vision item photo picker.

visionAddFirstPhoto.desc: Button label to add the first photo to a vision item.

visionAddAnotherPhoto.desc: Button label to add another photo, showing how many of 4 are used.

visionPhotosPrivacyNote.en: Photos are stored on this device only — they never leave your phone.
visionPhotosPrivacyNote.desc: Privacy note under the vision item photo picker.

visionStepsLabel.desc: Field label for the vision item milestones/steps.

visionStepsDescription.en: Break the dream into 3–6 tiny wins. Check them off as life moves.
visionStepsDescription.desc: Description under the vision item steps label.

visionNoStepsYet.en: No steps yet — add one below.
visionNoStepsYet.desc: Empty-state text when a vision item has no milestones.

visionStepHint.desc: Hint text for the add-milestone input field.

visionAffirmationLabel.desc: Field label for the vision item affirmation.

visionAffirmationDescription.en: "I am…" beats "I want to…" — the brain hears it as already real.
visionAffirmationDescription.desc: Description under the vision item affirmation label.

visionAffirmationHint.en: I am present, patient, and proud of how I show up.
visionAffirmationHint.desc: Hint text for the vision item affirmation field.

visionSuggestFromTitle.desc: Button that auto-suggests an affirmation from the dream title.

visionTabVision.desc: Tab label for the vision details tab in the edit sheet.

visionTabPhotos.desc: Tab label for the photos tab in the vision edit sheet.

visionTabSteps.desc: Tab label for the milestones/steps tab in the vision edit sheet.

visionTabAffirm.desc: Tab label for the affirmation tab in the vision edit sheet.

zenTodaysReflection.desc: Overline label above the daily zen quote.

zenMorningIntention.desc: Section title for the morning intention widget in the Zen tab.

zenReflectionPrompts.desc: Section title for the evening reflection prompts in the Zen tab.

zenThreeGoodThings.desc: Section title for the gratitude widget in the Zen tab.

zenMindfulMoment.desc: Section title for the breathing reminder in the Zen tab.

zenIntentionPrompt0.desc: Rotating hint for the morning intention field.

zenIntentionPrompt1.desc: Rotating hint for the morning intention field.

zenIntentionPrompt2.en: I will show up for myself by…
zenIntentionPrompt2.desc: Rotating hint for the morning intention field.

zenIntentionPrompt3.en: One thing I'm grateful for right now is…
zenIntentionPrompt3.desc: Rotating hint for the morning intention field.

zenSetIntention.desc: Button to save the morning intention.

zenReflectionPrompt1.en: What challenged me, and how did I handle it?

zenReflectionPrompt2.en: What am I most proud of today?

zenReflectionPrompt3.en: How did I take care of myself today?

zenReflectionPrompt4.en: What would I do differently tomorrow?

zenReflectionPrompt5.en: Who or what am I grateful for right now?

zenReflectionPrompt6.en: What did I learn about myself today?

zenReflectionPrompt7.en: How did I show up for my sobriety today?

zenNextPrompt.desc: Button to cycle to the next evening reflection prompt.

zenGoodThingHint.desc: Hint text in each of the three good-things gratitude fields.

zenExercise0Title.desc: Title of a mindful-moment grounding exercise.

zenExercise0Desc.en: Name 5 things you see, 4 you can touch, 3 you hear, 2 you smell, 1 you taste.

zenExercise1Title.desc: Title of a mindful-moment breathing exercise.

zenExercise1Desc.en: Breathe in for 4, hold for 4, breathe out for 4, hold for 4. Repeat 4 times.
zenExercise1Desc.desc: Description of the box breath exercise.

zenExercise2Title.desc: Title of a mindful-moment body scan exercise.

zenExercise2Desc.en: Close your eyes. Slowly scan from your toes to your head, releasing tension as you go.
zenExercise2Desc.desc: Description of the body scan exercise.

zenExercise3Title.desc: Title of a mindful-moment gratitude breathing exercise.

zenExercise3Desc.en: With each inhale, think of something you're grateful for. With each exhale, let go of what doesn't serve you.
zenExercise3Desc.desc: Description of the gratitude breath exercise.

zenOpenGuidedBreathing.en: Open guided breathing in Your Toolkit
zenOpenGuidedBreathing.desc: Link to the guided breathing tool for exercises that have a guided version.

zenMoreBreathingExercises.en: More breathing exercises in Your Toolkit
zenMoreBreathingExercises.desc: Link to more breathing exercises for exercises without a guided version.
